notes: Corroborated via EXACT phone match (847-998-1281) with Dr. Sean Cullinan as owner. The record's address (2640 Golf Rd) is STALE: the practice relocated to 908 Waukegan Rd, Glenview roughly two years ago after ~34 years at 2640 Golf Rd, keeping the same phone number and the same owner (Dr. Cullinan). A different business ('Niles Dental Clinic' per a Yelp listing) may now occupy the old 2640 Golf Rd address, but this is a relocation of the named entity, not a sale/succession — same owner/phone carried forward, so ownership_evidence_status is 'consistent' rather than a conflict. vendor_website_hint 'Glenviewfamilydental.Com' is correct. No careers page found (/careers/ returns 404; no hiring info on the office-locations page).
